name: codex-image
description: Generate raster images from Codex by invoking the local imagegen workflow and copying PNG outputs into the current workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Generate image files into the active workspace
interface.longDescription: A Codex skill for generating raster images through the local imagegen workflow, then copying the resulting PNG files from Codex's generated image session directory into the current project or a requested asset folder.
defaultPrompt: Generate an image asset for my current project
畫一張溫暖插畫風的產品情境圖
